aka: The Light Goes Off In Your Window
trans_title: 你的窗户里的灯熄灭后
The Light Goes Off In Your Window
introduction: SYNOPSISAe-ri is a ninth grader in an all girls' junior high school. Her mother has passed away and she lives with her aunt. Ae-ri is happy when her father returns from a trip abroad. However, it is revealed that Ae-ri has an untreatable tumor in her kidneys. Ae-ri's father resigns from his job and makes his daughter happy by going on a trip along the south coast as Ae-ri wishes. Ae-ri knows of her terminal condition but pretends not to know. She tells her father to marry his girlfriend, Jin-young. Ae-ri quickly rushes to get published the poems her father has written from time to time. While dancing an ecstatic waltz with her father, Ae-ri breathes her last.故事三年级的Ariy住在一间没有母亲的房子里，喜欢从父亲回家。然而事实证明，她患有一种肾脏肿瘤的绝症，她的父亲辞去了她的公司，并且为了让女儿在南海周围旅行感到高兴，这是女儿的愿望。阿里知道她的病情，假装不认识她，与她父亲的女朋友营安排婚姻，并催促出版她父亲的诗歌。阿里和爸爸一起用华丽的华尔兹醒来。
chinese_title: 你的窗户里的灯熄灭后
